PixelUpdated(uint256,address,uint8).notice: Emitted when a pixel is drawn with no same-block contention.

StateCollision(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when two transactions touch the same pixel in one block.

canvas(uint256).notice: 1D mapping representing the 50x50 grid. pixelId = x*50 + y

drawPixel(uint256,uint256,uint8).notice: Paint a pixel on the canvas.

userdoc.notice: A collaborative 50x50 pixel canvas that demonstrates Monad's         Optimistic Parallel EVM by detecting same-block state collisions.
